args.query: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid, status FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02';

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid, status FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02';

args.query:
SELECT 
 ch.caseid__c,
 ch.newvalue__c as owner_id,
 c.createddate,
 c.closeddate
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
 AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
 AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
 AND c.closeddate != 'None'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
 ch.caseid__c,
 ch.newvalue__c as owner_id,
 c.createddate,
 c.closeddate
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
 AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
 AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
 AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
 AND c.closeddate != 'None'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

args.query:
SELECT 
 ch.caseid__c,
 ch.oldvalue__c,
 ch.newvalue__c,
 ch.createddate as assignment_date
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
 AND ch.caseid__c IN (
   SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
 )
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
 ch.caseid__c,
 ch.oldvalue__c,
 ch.newvalue__c,
 ch.createddate as assignment_date
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
 AND ch.caseid__c IN (
   SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
 )
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

args.query:
SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate as history_date, ch.field__c, ch.oldvalue__c, ch.newvalue__c
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;
